Navigation.jciDesc: We coordinate premium treatments through JCI-accredited partner hospitals in Istanbul, Turkey. All procedures include VIP transfers, 5-star Bosphorus accommodation, and dedicated concierge support with a transparent no-hidden-fees policy.

Safety.heading: We Make No Compromises When It Comes To Your Life.
Safety.subtext: Meva Clinic operates under the strictest international and European safety standards. Impeccable care, experienced surgeons and 21st century technology.
Safety.erdemBio: Over 15 years of experience in complex Gastric Sleeve and Bypass surgeries. Titular member of IFSO Europe.
Safety.turanBio: Hollywood Smile, implantology and 3D reconstruction aesthetics expert. 8000+ implants successfully completed.
